scripts.deploy: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/deploy-route-preserving-worker.mjs wrangler.jsonc -- --env="" --outdir dist --upload-source-maps || (echo '::error::insecur-api Worker deploy failed before Sentry source map upload.' >&2 && exit 1) && node ../../scripts/post-deploy-sentry-sourcemaps.mjs insecur-api dist
scripts.deploy:preview: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/wrangler-with-deploy-config.mjs wrangler.jsonc -- deploy --env preview --keep-vars --outdir dist --upload-source-maps || (echo '::error::insecur-api-preview Worker deploy failed before Sentry source map upload.' >&2 && exit 1) && node ../../scripts/post-deploy-sentry-sourcemaps.mjs insecur-api-preview dist
scripts.deploy:preview:dry-run: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs node ../../scripts/wrangler-with-deploy-config.mjs wrangler.jsonc -- deploy --env preview --dry-run --outdir dist --keep-vars --upload-source-maps
